title: National Cybersecurity Strategy of Afghanistan (NCSA), November 2014
description: Afghan government (MCIT, Information Systems Security Directorate) national cybersecurity strategy from 2014. Domestic institutional issuer, but contains no mention of post-quantum / quantum-safe cryptography (predates the NIST PQC programme). Fails the explicit-PQC test.

title: National Cybersecurity Strategy of Afghanistan (ITU repository copy)
description: ITU-hosted copy of Afghanistan's 2014 national cybersecurity strategy. Issuer is the international body (ITU) hosting, original is MCIT; no PQC content. Fails domestic-via-trusted-domain and PQC tests.

title: ICT Policy for Afghanistan (Draft) - MCIT
description: Afghan Ministry of Communications and IT draft ICT policy. Domestic institutional issuer, but no mention of post-quantum / quantum-safe cryptography. Fails the explicit-PQC test.

title: About Afghanistan Root Certification Authority (ARCA) - MCIT
description: MCIT page about the national root certificate authority / PKI. Domestic institutional issuer and cryptography-adjacent, but no post-quantum / quantum-safe cryptography reference. Fails the explicit-PQC test.

title: Procurement of Afghanistan root certificate authority - MCIT
description: MCIT procurement notice for the Afghanistan root CA. Domestic institutional issuer, classical PKI only, no PQC reference. Fails the explicit-PQC test.

title: Achievements of Ministry of Communications and Information Technology - MCIT
description: MCIT achievements page mentioning AfCERT, traffic monitoring (Nixa), SSL/electronic certification, and a draft national cybersecurity strategy. Domestic institutional issuer, no PQC reference. Fails the explicit-PQC test.

title: Cyber laws of Afghanistan / Cybercrime in the Penal Code - MCIT (Dari)
description: MCIT Dari-language page on Afghanistan's cyber laws / cybercrime provisions in the Penal Code. Domestic institutional issuer, no post-quantum / quantum-safe cryptography reference. Fails the explicit-PQC test.
